channel.title: Taylor swift on Cryptic Blend
channel.description: Recent content in Taylor swift on Cryptic Blend

item.title: Top 10 Taylor swift Bridges
item.description: Here are top 10 taylor swift bridges: Some intro if needed 1. All too well Well, maybe we got lost in translation, maybe I asked for too much But maybe this thing was a masterpiece ’til you tore it all up Runnin’ scared, I was there I remember it all too well And you call me up again just to break me like a promise So casually cruel in the name of bein’ honest
